lastReleaseMessage: dashboard: writer emits standardized items-left and backlog item lists

barRaise.topFinding: Nothing material changed in the product since the 2026-06-25 full pass. The only commits since are two dashboard-writer tweaks (e6b39a9, 61a089b) to scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1, a 15-line, well-guarded enhancement that emits standardized itemsLeft.items and backlog arrays into the status JSON; no app runtime code, schema, or public artifact moved. The tree is clean, all three version pills agree at v1.0.2, and the 2026-06-28 canonical audit reads 0/0/0. The product stays feature-complete and parked. One cosmetic LOW carries over: the v1.0.2 CHANGELOG entry is still a stub whose bullet repeats its heading.

deferred.title: Collapse the duplicated v1.0.2 CHANGELOG bullet into one human sentence
deferred.reason: fix opportunistically on next CHANGELOG-touching release; no current step
